weapon_ability_description: Models in the bearer's unit have a Leadership characteristic of 6+.
Add 1 to Charge rolls made for the bearer's unit.
The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks.
The bearer has the Feel No Pain 3+ ability against Psychic Attacks and mortal wounds.
The bearer has a Save characteristic of 3+.
Each time a model is destroyed by this weapon, you can select one friendly Plaguebearers unit within 12\ of the bearer and return 1 destroyed Plaguebearer model to that unit."
